creator: pawel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Naram Qashat <cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com> wrote:

> I have an issue with the commit done for this PR. It removes the 
> ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS} conditional in post-install. This should NOT
> have been done, because the files it tries to install do not exist in
> the work directory when the DOCS option is disabled. Can this please
> be fixed?

Fixed in r348925. It was my mistake, sorry for breakage.
